name: brain
description: A committed, Obsidian-style codebase map for a project: brain/INDEX.md indexes areas, key files, and notable classes/entrypoints so a fresh Claude session starts oriented. A SessionStart hook injects the compact map (with a staleness hint when it lags HEAD); /brain reads it and /brain index builds/refreshes it. Map-only tracer (Phase 1a); an anchored-notes layer is planned. Nothing outside brain/ is ever modified.
